title: Multi-resource stacks: Deploy a full application
scenario: Ship a complete microservice stack to the `production` namespace in one YAML: a Namespace, ConfigMap with `LOG_LEVEL=info`, a Secret with a `jwt-secret` key, a Deployment (`api-server`, 3 replicas) wired to the ConfigMap and Secret, and a LoadBalancer Service exposing port 443.
starterYaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: api-config
  namespace: production
data:
  LOG_LEVEL_CONFIG: debug
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: api-secrets
  namespace: production
type: Opaque
data:
  jwt-secret: c3VwZXJzZWNyZXQ=
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-server
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-server
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: node:20-alpine
        env:
        - name: LOG_LEVEL
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: api-config
              key: LOG_LEVEL
        - name: JWT_SECRET
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: api-secrets
              key: jwt-secret
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-svc
  namespace: production
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: api-server
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 3000

objectives.description: Service routes to at least 1 Running pod

hints.text: All resources must be in the `production` namespace — check every `metadata.namespace` field.
The ConfigMap key name (`LOG_LEVEL`) and Secret key name (`jwt-secret`) must match the env `valueFrom` references in the Deployment containers exactly.
The starter YAML is already correct. Apply it as-is to complete the lab, then explore how each resource connects in the Cluster View.

solution:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: api-config
  namespace: production
data:
  LOG_LEVEL: info
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: api-secrets
  namespace: production
type: Opaque
data:
  jwt-secret: c3VwZXJzZWNyZXQ=
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-server
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-server
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: node:20-alpine
        env:
        - name: LOG_LEVEL
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: api-config
              key: LOG_LEVEL
        - name: JWT_SECRET
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: api-secrets
              key: jwt-secret
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-svc
  namespace: production
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  selector:
    app: api-server
  ports:
  - port: 443
    targetPort: 3000
